segments.text: OFFICER:Hello. Er, I'm Dawn Matthews.
segments.translation: 官员：你好。我是道恩马休斯。

segments.text: STUDENT:Yes, hello.
segments.translation: 学生：你好。

segments.text: I've been referred to you because I'm enquiring about the refresher courses that you run.
segments.translation: 我想找你询问一下你的进修课程。

segments.text: I'd like to find out a bit more about them.
segments.translation: 我想多了解点儿信息。

segments.text: OFFICER:OK.
segments.translation: 官员：好的。

segments.text: Well, we run quite a few different short courses for students who are either returning to study or studying part-time.
segments.translation: 我们为重返校园和利用业余时间读书的学生提供一些不同的短期课程，

segments.text: Um, tell me about your situation.
segments.translation: 跟我说说你的情况。

segments.text: STUDENT:Well, I think that I really need some help in preparing for the coming semester, especially to build up my confidence a bit and help me study effectively because, you see, I've been out in the work-force for nearly twelve years now, so it really is a long time since I was last a student.
segments.translation: 学生：我想我真的需要一些帮助为了下学期做准备，特别是重塑我的自信心，提高我的学习效率。因为我已经离校工作了将近12年，所以离我还是学生的时代有点久远了。

segments.text: OFFICER:Yes, it can seem like a long time, can't it?
segments.translation: 官员：是的，确实是很长时间了，不是吗？

segments.text: Um, well, let me start by telling you what courses we have that might suit you.
segments.translation: 我先告诉你我们的哪些课程可能适合你。

segments.text: Are you an undergraduate or a postgraduate?
segments.translation: 你是本科生还是研究生，

segments.text: Arts or Sciences?
segments.translation: 文科还是理科？

segments.text: STUDENT:Undergraduate and I'm in the Business faculty.
segments.translation: 学生：我是本科生，在商学院。

segments.text: OFFICER:Right then.
segments.translation: 官员：好的。

segments.text: First of all, there's our intensive 'Study for Success' seminar on the first and second of February.
segments.translation: 首先，我们在二月第一天和第二天有集中化的“成功学习”研讨班。

segments.text: It's aimed at students like you who are uncertain about what to expect at college, and looks at a fairly wide range of approaches to university learning, to motivate you to begin your study and build on your own learning strategies.
segments.translation: 受众群体是像你一样不确定在大学学些什么，没有一个具体的学习方法的学生们。目的是激发你们的学习动力，建立你们自己的学习策略。

segments.text: STUDENT:Mm, that sounds good.
segments.translation: 学生：恩，听起来不错。

segments.text: What are some of the strategies that are presented?
segments.translation: 你提到的策略是什么？

segments.text: OFFICER:Well, we try to cover all aspects of study.
segments.translation: 官员：我们试图覆盖各个方面的学习。

segments.text: Some of the strategies in writing, for example, would be improving your planning for writing, organising your thinking and building some techniques to help you write more clearly.
segments.translation: 例如，在写作方面提高你的策划能力、组织你的思路、建立一些技巧帮你把内容写得更清晰。

segments.text: With reading, there'll be sessions aimed at getting into the habit of analyzing material as you read it, and tips to help you record and remember what you have read.
segments.translation: 有些读书方面的课程会帮你养成分析内容的习惯，还有一些帮你牢记你所读内容的窍门。

segments.text: It really is very important to begin reading confidently right from the beginning.
segments.translation: 从一开始就充满自信的读下去很重要。

segments.text: STUDENT:Mm.
segments.translation: 学生：嗯。

segments.text: OFFICER:There's also advice on how to get the most from your lectures and practice in giving confident presentations, as well as how to prepare for exams.
segments.translation: 官员：还有一些建议是关于如何充分利用讲座、练习自信的演讲和备考。

segments.text: STUDENT:What about the motivational side of things?
segments.translation: 学生：关于激励的那方面是怎样的？

segments.text: OFFICER:Ah Well, there's a range of motivational exercises that we do to help the students feel positive and enthusiastic about their study.
segments.translation: 官员：我们有很多的激励锻炼使我们帮助学生积极、热情的面对他们的学业。

segments.text: The process of learning and exploring a subject can lead to a whole new way of looking at the world, and the study skills and techniques that you build up can be applied in all sorts of different ways.
segments.translation: 学习、探索一个学科的过程可以引导我们用一种新的方式看世界，而且你建立的学习技能可以用在各个不同的方面。

segments.text: STUDENT:Actually, I... I'm very excited about the whole thing of taking up studying again but, you know, I'm a little nervous about whether I'll manage to get everything done.
segments.translation: 学生：事实上，我很激动又能重新学习了。但是我对于自己是否能搞定这一切而感到紧张。

segments.text: I suppose it's the same for all mature students?
segments.translation: 我想所有的成年学生都有这种感觉吧？

segments.text: OFFICER:Of course it is.
segments.translation: 官员：当然是。

segments.text: Two of the key components of the course aretime management and overcoming procrastination.
segments.translation: 课程的两个关键部分是时间管理和克服拖延症。

segments.text: People discover that, once they learn to plan their days, all the work can be accomplished and there'll still be time for leisure.
segments.translation: 人们发现一旦他们学会规划好每一天后，所有的工作都能完成并且还有休闲时间。

segments.text: STUDENT:Is there an enrolment fee?
segments.translation: 学生：需要注册费吗？

segments.text: OFFICER:Well, er, oh, just a minute, let's see...
segments.translation: 官员：稍等，让我看看。

segments.text: Ah, the cost is thirty pounds, which includes all course materials and morning tea.
segments.translation: 需要交30英镑，其中包括所有的材料费和早茶。

segments.text: You have to arrange your own lunch.
segments.translation: 午餐需要你自行解决。

segments.text: STUDENT:That wouldn't be a problem.
segments.translation: 学生：这不是问题。

segments.text: I already make sandwiches for my three kids and my wife and myself every day.
segments.translation: 我每天都为我的三个孩子、妻子和我自己做三明治。

segments.text: I won't have to change my routine.
segments.translation: 我的日常套路是不会改的。

segments.text: OFFICER:No.
segments.translation: 官员：不，

segments.text: Now, I need to tell you that this is a very popular course and it's essential that you book well ahead of time.
segments.translation: 是的，现在我得告诉你这是非常受欢迎的课程，你有必要提前预订。

segments.text: In fact, the Course Convenor tells me that there are only five places left.
segments.translation: 事实上，课程的召集人告诉我只剩下5个名额了。

segments.text: STUDENT:What other course might be good for me?
segments.translation: 学生：还有什么其他的课程对我有帮助吗？

segments.text: OFFICER:There is one other that you could benefit from.
segments.translation: 官员：还有一个课程你能受益。

segments.text: It's simply called Learning Skills for University Study' and is on three consecutive mornings starting on a Monday, from nine to twelve, and costs twenty-five pounds.
segments.translation: 它叫“大学学习技巧”，开始于周一的9点到12点，连续3个早晨的课程，花费25英镑。

segments.text: This is aimed at upgrading the study skills most school-leavers have and help them cope with the increased demands of university study.
segments.translation: 目的是帮助多数离校的人员提高学习技能，帮助他们应付要求渐高的大学学习。

segments.text: It focuses mainly on making students more responsible for their own success.
segments.translation: 重点是让学生为他们自己的成功负责。

segments.text: STUDENT:What sort of things are covered in this course?
segments.translation: 学生：这门课程包括什么？

segments.text: OFFICER:Well, basically it's more advanced thinking, note-taking, reading and writing strategies, but also some input about stress management.
segments.translation: 官员：基本上，更多的是培养先进思想、记笔记练习、读写策略和一些压力管理方面。

segments.text: STUDENT:I think I'd be better off starting from the basics and looking at all the strategies, don't you?
segments.translation: 学生：我想我最好从基础开始，看看所有策略，你说呢？

segments.text: OFFICER:Yes from what you've told me.
segments.translation: 官员：是的，从你告诉我的情况看，

segments.text: I think that's more in line with your situation.
segments.translation: 我认为这么做更适合你。

segments.text: STUDENT:Alright then, um, can I book a place on the Study for Success seminar course now?
segments.translation: 学生：好的，我现在能预定一个“成功学习”的课程名额吗？

segments.text: OFFICER:Yes.Let me just get out a registration form and take down your details.
segments.translation: 官员：当然，让我拿一张登记表记下你的详细资料。
